summary: Lead started M6-ALPHA-SYSTEM-CONTRACT-001 after M6 task graph closure entered main. gameplay_designer writer thread 019f05f2-2542-7db1-b9cf-8f1890569919 is assigned to define the bounded M6 Alpha system-complete contract without product code changes.

tests_run.result: M6-ALPHA-SYSTEM-CONTRACT-001 was READY on main before start.
Spawned gameplay_designer writer thread 019f05f2-2542-7db1-b9cf-8f1890569919, nickname Monsoon.

decisions: Start the first downstream M6 planning task after M6-TASK-GRAPH-001 closure entered main through PR #130.
Keep the task planning-only and limited to allowed status/task/message/project-status files.
Preserve DEFER_MANUAL_NODE_BATTLE exactly: no M6/M7/M8 manual node battle implementation, spike, research, validation, or exit-gate dependency is authorized.
risks: M6 Alpha contract could over-expand into M7 content lock, M8 release work, or post-1.0 candidates if Human Gate boundaries are not restated explicitly.
Manual node battle must remain a non-blocking post-1.0 candidate note only.
requested_action: Define the bounded M6 Alpha system-complete contract within allowed paths, update M6-ALPHA-SYSTEM-CONTRACT-001 to REVIEW, and return a gameplay_designer REVIEW handoff for systems_architect review.

acceptance_criteria: Define the minimum M6 Alpha contract for a start-to-victory playthrough, including start conditions, one accepted victory condition, failure conditions, evidence requirements, and no-placeholder major system expectations.
Map the contract to accepted M1-M5 systems and the M6 DAG without adding product code, content-source data, dependencies, release artifacts, or roadmap changes.

Preserve DEFER_MANUAL_NODE_BATTLE exactly: manual node battle may appear only as a post-1.0 non-blocking candidate note and not as M6/M7/M8 implementation, spike, research, validation, or exit-gate dependency.

Preserve Human Gates for frozen product, platform, core architecture, paid services, accounts or secrets, server or multiplayer, telemetry, arbitrary-code mods, commercial or branding decisions, major cultural-risk decisions, irreversible migrations, and any formal 1.0 scope reversal.
required_tests: node -e JSON parse/shape check for M6-ALPHA-SYSTEM-CONTRACT-001
